data.title: Where do North Americans shop online?
data.description: Digital Commerce 360 looks at the top online retailers used by North American shoppers — from Chinese marketplaces to U.S. retail giants.

data.title: CVS names new CEO as Karen Lynch steps down
data.description: David Joyner became the new CEO of CVS Health Corp. as of Oct. 17.

data.title: Forrester: Customer obsession is key to B2B revenue and profits
data.description: “Customer-obsessed” B2B companies build better relationships with employees and customers than peer companies without a strong customer focus, Forrester Research says.

data.title: Ecommerce earnings recap: What you missed from Procter & Gamble, Ferragamo and more
data.description: Both Procter & Gamble and Ferragamo cited problems in China in their earnings, with P&G noting behavior that could impact ecommerce.

data.title: B2B marketplaces: From niche to mainstream
data.description: Projections suggest that the global number of B2B marketplaces could surpass 1,000 within the next few years, according to data and analysis contained in the newly released 2024 B2B Marketplace 750 Report from Digital Commerce 360.
